violations.description: Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee's single-use gloves were not discarded after being damaged or soiled. Food employees observed using wiping cloths to wipe off gloves and continued with tasks. Gloves should be changed when soiled.

Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. Pan of chips near the soup station was not covered by the sneeze guard. Food items should be protected from contamination.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Beverage dispensing machine was found dirty along the back, behind the nozzles. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Slicer was found dirty during inspection. Slicer should be cleaned after each use.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Plumbing under the dishwasher was found leaking during inspection. Plumbing should be maintained in good repair.
